title: dokimobs
description: Rediscover classic mobs with enhanced animations and reimagined visuals in your blocky adventures!
body: # 🎮 DokiMobs Visual Refresh Mod **Breathe new charm into your blocky companions!** ✨ --- ## 🌟 Core Features ### 🎀 Dynamic Visual Refresh - **Reimagined Creatures**：Classic mobs redesigned with refined aesthetics while preserving original identity - **Smooth Animation Pack**：Natural idle motions and environmental interactions - **Cohesive Art Style**：Subtle decorative elements with low-saturation color palette ### 📦 Current Content **20 Enhanced Mob Models:** | 🍄 Friendly Mobs | 🌙 Neutral Mobs | ⚔️ Hostile Mobs | |------------------|-----------------|-----------------| | Pig | Enderman | Skeleton | | Cow | Wandering Trader| Zombie | | Sheep | Llama | Creeper | | Chicken | Trader Llama | Spider | | Mooshroom | Bee | Cave Spider | | Villager | - | Drowned | | - | - | Phantom | | - | - | Warden | | - | - | Zombie Villager | --- ## 🎨 Design Philosophy A balanced visual upgrade respecting Minecraft's essence: - Enhanced expressiveness through refined animations - Stylized textures maintaining original silhouettes - Optimized visual clarity without over-design --- > 🍃「Rediscover familiar creatures through a polished lens - every encounter feels fresh」
